文件启动，空白屏幕逐渐让位于一只在蓝天中漂浮的水母。水母身后的横幅自豪地宣告这部电影是“空中水母制作”。横幅淡出，取而代之的是一个粗体字标题，“布丁恐慌 XIII — 收藏版”，下方小字写着“一部沙克斯·格雷莫里的电影”。

	“这就是你的快递？”利普斯困惑地皱起眉头。“一个装满巧克力布丁的热浴缸？”
	
	“还有这根装满布丁的额外软管，”雷克斯说，不知从哪里举起一根一英尺宽的软管。
	
	“利普斯，我们到底要怎么处理这些布丁？”坎迪夸张地挥舞着双臂，她那较小、可握的乳房弹跳着。
	
	“嗯，我想我们得试试看，”利普斯歪着头说。
	
	“你是什么意思？”坎迪双手叉腰问道。
	
	利普斯没有回答，而是狠狠推了坎迪一把，让较小的奥维人双臂挥舞着向后跌入布丁浴缸。

	当她们浮出水面时，利普斯一边咒骂一边擦去脸上的布丁，而坎迪则疯狂地大笑。

	“嘿，看起来你们需要帮忙，”雷克斯举起软管说。一阵咕噜声响起，更多的布丁从软管中喷出，淋在浴缸里的两个奥维人身上。
	
	她们尖叫着抗议，被越来越多的巧克力甜点淋浴，雷克斯挥舞着软管，确保她们柔软的身体每一寸都逃不过甜美的涂层。
	
	当雷克斯短暂地将软管从她们身上移开时，坎迪（通过她的声音在巧克力涂层下可辨认）兴奋起来。“但是快递先生！如果……”她困惑地停顿了一下。
	
	画面短暂卡顿，出现一阵静电，仿佛两个镜头被拼接在一起。
	
	“如果我不吃我的肉！”坎迪得意地喊道。
	
	“（终于！）”一个微弱的声音从屏幕外传来。
	
	站在涂满巧克力的热浴缸边缘，雷克斯拉下连体衣的拉链，露出九英寸长的闪亮打结阴茎。坎迪艰难地穿过泥沼，直到她与雷克斯鲜红的阴茎齐平。没有多余的铺垫，她一口含住它，用甜美糖浆般的条纹涂抹他的茎身。
	
	雷克斯愉悦地呻吟，将喷布丁的软管举得更高，淋在利普斯身上。丰满的奥维人呻吟着，在浓稠的液体中沐浴，双手上下抚摸她丰腴的曲线，玩弄着她覆盖着巧克力的乳房。她转身扭动，像某种在甜点喷泉下的活生生的甜点。
	
	屏幕分裂，一边从雷克斯的视角展示坎迪热情的巧克力口交，另一边展示利普斯的异域舞蹈。背景音乐，在此之前一直不引人注目，音量逐渐增大，利普斯和坎迪都随着音乐移动，一个随着节拍性感地跳舞，另一个随着速度加快越来越快地上下摆动头部。
	
	最后，雷克斯发出一声巨大的嚎叫，抓住坎迪的头将她从他的阴茎上拉开，然后将几股浓稠的珍珠色精液射在她涂满布丁的脸上。同时，软管喷出一大股布丁，将利普斯冲倒在浴缸里。
	
	事后，雷克斯放开坎迪，利普斯浮出水面，两个奥维人都筋疲力尽地倒在浴缸边缘。雷克斯放下软管，镜头拉近到被丢弃的设备上，显然已经耗尽，现在只滴着微弱的布丁细流。
	
	[break]
	
	屏幕慢慢淡入黑色，片尾字幕短暂滚动。片刻后，文字消失，露出一只毛茸茸的鸟形生物，蹲坐在一把古董导演椅上。屏幕上的小横幅标注这个生物为“沙克斯·格雷莫里”。
	
	沙克斯·格雷莫里是一只托维人，有着薰衣草色的羽毛，部分羽毛藏在黑色高领毛衣下。一顶相配的软呢帽戴在他头上，一撮白色羽毛从帽子一侧垂下。一副四镜片墨镜架在他靛蓝色的喙上。
	
	他将两双手交叉叠放在一起，靠在导演椅上，对着镜头外的采访者说话。“《布丁恐慌 XIII》是我的一个激情项目，”他用丰富而富有音乐感的声音说道。“我想创作一部能够在视频色情类型中探讨存在主义复杂性的作品。我们都熟悉所谓的‘快递员’原型，但我被驱使去审视那个熟悉的角色。我希望观众会问他、她或他们自己，‘我……是我自己生活的快递员吗？还是我只是摄像机？’”

	他停下来，从屏幕外接过一杯茶。他啜了一口，然后补充道，“坎迪简直是个噩梦。”

original: As far as universities went, University of New Texas did not have the most...rigorous engineering program. Most of it had to be scraped together from off-planet archives, generated from imported textbooks. A professor was coded, not hired. Adam had spent four years in classrooms nearly alone, most of his courseload met with derision from his peers. It wasn’t natural, they said, for a proper New Texan bull to study all that fancy-schmancy stuff. As they plodded steadily towards degrees in agriculture — if they didn’t drop out first — the rest of his classmates made it clear in no uncertain terms: Adam was weird. But was it really so strange for a guy to be interested in how things worked? Why things did the things they did? Sure, it wasn’t as if he was some kind of sexless monk, but Adam couldn’t help but wonder at the mechanics of the milking machine’s suction before he ended up leering at the girl whose milk was getting drained. There was so many things to learn, so many devices to understand, so many mysteries to uncover, unwrap, unambiguously unravel! Make no mistake, Adam had passion. It was that passion that carried him through a college career spent more or less in solitude. Then Adam had found out just how many job openings there were for a bull with his kind of degree, and, well, passion was great and all, but it wasn’t fucking magic. Oh, sure, there were plenty of jobs available, but Adam wasn’t about to just toss his diploma in the closet and sign up to be a professional breeding stud! Not full-time, at least. He’d only taken that one job to make ends meet while he pursued his true dream. But the search had gone on far longer than Adam had realized it ever could. He was just a few weeks from giving up on a New Texas job and just catching a ship off-planet to try his luck somewhere else, but... Well, it turned out that there was a place for bulls like him. Holliday Innovations. It seemed as if they were just about the only organization on the entire planet interested in bulls with brains in their skulls. Adam had seen the posting and sent in his curriculum vitae not three minutes after that. The interview was short. Downright perfunctory. They’d called Adam up, asked him if he knew how to spell the word “encyclopedia,” and that had been that. Then he’d used the word “schematics” in a sentence, and that had gotten him promoted. So there he was. Standing in front of the lab that had hired him, eyes twinkling, heart pounding in his chest, Adam looked for all the world like a schoolboy ready for his first day of class. Except for the part where he was over seven feet tall and capable of benching six plates. That diminished the air of boyish innocence, if only slightly. But he even had a little bowtie on! Adorable. Adam took a deep breath and steeled himself. He was nervous, sure, but this was what he’d always wanted, wasn’t it? This was his dream. He stepped inside, frissons giving way to a tingling delight, and Adam only felt that excitement swell up brighter as he walked down the hallways to the lab — the lab! — that he was going to spend his time working in. Numbers and placards blended together, but then...! Yes! There it was! 443, Applied Pneumatics. And there SHE was, sitting back, scribbling notes onto a hardlight pad. The woman he’d be working under. Casey Lang, PhD. Long, auburn hair, sleepy green eyes, she could’ve slipped right into any human lab in the galaxy if it weren’t for the cute little horns poking from her hairline. People definitely would’ve gawked at the size of her fat, heaving knockers, sure, but it wasn’t like K-cup tits were a genetic impossibility. Adam definitely wasn’t going to be distracted by her figure, though! No, as he walked into the lab, the only thing he thrust towards her was his hand, eager to give hers a good, firm shake. “Doctor Lang!” Adam chirped, eyes sparkling. “Pleasure to finally meet you in person! I’m Adam. Adam Brooks?” Casey blinked at her work before she turned her attention to Adam, but once she adjusted her perspective — she’d settled her gaze a little too low to make proper eye contact, common mistake — Casey smiled wide and shook Adam’s hand. “You’re the new guy, huh? Good to have you on.” She rose from her seat, hands thrust into the pockets of her labcoat. “I’ve been shouting my lungs out trying to get another body over here; you have no idea just how much you’re gonna help me out.” Her smile turned wry, and she quirked an eyebrow up at him. “Heard you said ‘schematics’ during the IQ test.” Adam laughed and shook his head. “It wasn’t the most stringent evaluation I’ve ever been subjected to, but I’m still happy to hear I, ah... Passed.” He straightened up and looked around the lab, nearly aglow with enthusiasm. “If I’d have known the word ‘schematics’ would get me into a lab like this, I think I would’ve changed my last name to it.” Casey bent over just slightly with a loud, sudden laugh. “‘Adam Schematics,’” she tested, smirking to the side and making her way back to the workstation she’d been at before. “That makes you sound like a superhero or something. original: These days, politics were an entirely different beast. Cameron Davis leaned back at his desk as he contemplated that simple fact. Part of him was looking forward to the visitor who’d called him the other day, the one with a voice like electric sugar, the one who’d practically purred her “modest request.” The one who was almost certainly a Shifter. He pinched the bridge of his nose and sighed. It was just his luck, honestly. Decade and a half in the guts of Washington, and just as he’d gotten any semblance of authority, the world had gone upside-down. Bodyshifters had appeared out of absolutely fucking nowhere, and they’d changed the entire way that politics would ever be played. They were already so deeply ingrained in society that there was no hope whatsoever of extricating them — or would it be excising them? — and the legal questions they presented were only increasing. Did voting rights extend to any sapient persons in the country? When a Shifter could reproduce within days and form another wholly mature individual, did that count as “naturalized” birth? Were there now two voters? If the newest of the two was just as capable of thought, speech, and reason as the eldest, why wouldn’t they be entitled to a vote? It was all so messy, and though the federal government had successfully put off the question of Shifter Rights for a while, they couldn’t do it forever. Worse than that, Shifters knew that, and Shifter lobbyists were slowly beginning to make themselves known in Washington. Lobbyists like the one that Cameron was waiting for right now. This was a bad idea. This was a very bad idea. What was he thinking? Cameron suddenly shivered, the full weight of his mistake crashing down on him. He’d heard the stories. Who hadn’t? A Shifter got her claws into a guy, and one month later, he was cocked-out and barely able to think of anything but the next time he’d be able to pump his load into whichever member of his all-Shifter harem got her turn next. This was dangerous. This was dangerous. But maybe he’d be different. It wasn’t as if he was some Joe Schmoe living in the middle of nowhere, right? Then, more or less resigned to his fate, he buzzed her in. Fuck it, right? He’d face this whole thing head-on. There was no point in trying to out-subterfuge a Shifter, so he wasn’t even going to try. As he waited for his guest to arrive, the silence of his office became all the more suffocating. He tried to ignore the way his heart pounded in his chest, but that only left Cameron with the sound of his breathing to focus on instead. Not much better. Then there was a knock at his door. Cameron gulped, took a moment to steady himself, and replied. “The door should be unlocked.” His guest stepped in without a word, and time seemed to stand still. He’d heard of Shifters before. The largest and most well-known human society is the Terran-Space Coalition, consisting of the human homeworld and various member planets. However, despite the T.S.C.’s efforts to appear hegemonic, there are many other confederations and independent human-dominated worlds which are not a part of it.

original: Humans have managed to maintain extensive records deep into their history such that it would be impossible to properly describe the entirety of their development in this short summary. Two traits have remained constants - exploration and conflict. Nearly every major advancement has come as a result of one of these two. Humans are a race that easily throws themselves to war, falling back on tribal instincts that lead them to obliterate or dominate others. Additionally, they will recklessly throw themselves at the unknown, determined to go to difficult locations for no other reason than to be the first.
translation: 人类将其历史详尽记录，源远流长，这篇短小摘要实难尽述其发展全貌。唯有两大特质贯穿始终——探索与冲突。几乎每一次重大进步，皆源于二者之一。人类这个种族，极易投身战火，动辄诉诸部落本能，将他人赶尽杀绝或臣服于己。此外，他们还会不顾一切地冲向未知，决意涉足险境，不为别的，只为拔得头筹。

original: Ausar naturally have a soft, velvety fur covering their arms and legs, though this serves as poor protection against anything besides the environment. As such, the race has strongly invested in personal shield technology, producing some of the most advanced in the galaxy. Due to their high physical agility, most Ausar shun heavier armors such as that worn by human Marines, instead relying on linked shields across fighting formations to guard against attacks. The staff was, in ancient times, the primary weapon of their race, and remains the basis for their current weapons technology, with both shock-pikes and crook-shaped railguns being their favored armaments of the day.
translation: 奥萨尔人天生手臂和腿上覆盖着柔软如绒的皮毛，但这层皮毛除了抵御环境外，防护力极差。正因如此，这个种族在个人护盾技术上投入巨大，造出了银河系最先进的护盾。由于身手极为敏捷，大多数奥萨尔人摒弃人类陆战队员穿戴的重甲，转而依靠战斗编队中彼此链接的护盾来格挡攻击。长杖在古代是他们种族的主要武器，至今仍是其武器技术的根基，而震击长矛和钩形磁轨炮则是他们当今偏爱的装备。

original: The Ausar homeworld is a vast, arid desert spotted with great shimmering oases and vast temple-cities dedicated to the god-kings of old. Most of the world is uninhabited, occupied by deadly scorpion-like creatures the size of a horse as well as huge worms which have been the race’s primary source of food for aeons. After taking to the stars roughly 1000 years before contact with humans, the Ausar have come to adapt to many different environs, though most worlds they terraform retain the hot, dry desert conditions of their homeworld.
translation: 奥萨尔人的母星是一片广袤干旱的沙漠，其间点缀着波光粼粼的巨大绿洲，以及供奉古代神王的宏伟庙城。星球大部分区域无人居住，栖息着马匹大小的致命蝎形生物，还有巨大的蠕虫——千万年来，它们一直是这个种族的主要食物来源。在与人类接触的大约一千年前，奥萨尔人便已踏入星海，逐渐适应了多种多样的环境，不过他们改造的大多数星球，仍保留着母星那种炎热干燥的沙漠环境。

original: Due to the long standing friendship between Ausar and Mankind, the two are perhaps the most common of xeno-romantic entanglements. Half-breeds resulting from Ausar-Human relationships are typically somewhat taller and heavier than the average Ausar, often losing arm and leg fur, though they tend to retain the tails of their alien parent, and have smaller, floppier and less sensitive wolf ears. Half-ausar are usually born in pairs, can see at birth, and come of age as humans do. Being one of the most common hybrid races in the galaxy, half-ausar have recently become a primary option in the U.G.C. census, rather than being filled under “Other/Hybrid race.”

original: Society

context: <<POS:04772269>> blockHeader("Society")

original: Unlike most modern civilizations, the Ausar have not unified under a central government. Instead, their planets are ruled by independent kings and queens, who convene to decide matters related to their race. It wasn’t until humanity’s gift of quantum communication that the fragmented Ausar society, spread across the stars, tightened to present a strong, united front in the galaxy. However, the local kings are still relatively free to act as they choose. Amongst them, the King of Ausaril (the Ausar homeworld) is considered the “King of Kings”, is generally deferred to by lesser despots and holds the only post able to call the entire Ausar to war or countermand planetary kings (in large part thanks to a crushingly huge fleet and more advanced technology produced on the homeworld). In times of trouble or war, the Joint Ausar Fleet can be called on, with each world in the federation contracted to supply a certain number of ships and soldiers to the joint defense each decade.
translation: 与大多数现代文明不同，奥萨尔人没有统一的中央政府。相反，他们的星球由独立的国王和女王统治，他们开会决定与他们种族有关的事务。直到人类发明了量子通信技术，分散在各个星体上的奥萨尔人社会才逐渐团结起来，在银河系中形成了一个强大的统一战线。不过，当地的国王仍然相对自由，可以随心所欲地行事。其中，奥萨瑞尔（奥萨尔人的母星）国王被视为“万王之王”，一般情况下，较小的暴君都会对他敬而远之，他也是唯一一个能够号召整个奥萨尔人参战或推翻行星国王的职位（这在很大程度上要归功于奥萨尔母星所拥有的庞大舰队和更先进的技术）。在发生麻烦或战争时，奥萨尔联合舰队可以出动，联邦中的每个世界都要签订合同，每十年为联合防卫提供一定数量的战舰和士兵。

original: The Ausar are known to be an exceptionally friendly and peaceful race. They are slow to anger, though they are quite territorial, and have rarely warred with other races. When interacting with humans, the Ausar are known to be outgoing and affectionate, readily making friendships that last a lifetime. Some have commented that most Ausar get along better with humans than even their own kind, and thanks to their wolf-like appearance, they are occasionally called “Man’s best friend among the stars.” As humanity’s first contact with alien life, and longest and staunchest ally, this saying has thus far rung true.
translation: 众所周知，奥萨尔人极其友善平和。他们不易动怒，尽管领地意识相当强，却鲜少与其他种族兵戎相见。与人类相处时，奥萨尔人热情外向、重情重义，轻易便能结下维系一生的友谊。有人曾说，大多数奥萨尔人与人类相处，甚至比跟自己的同类还要融洽。加上他们那酷似狼的外表，偶尔会被称作“星际间人类最好的朋友”。作为人类接触到的第一个外星生命，也是人类最长久、最坚定的盟友，这句话至今看来，依然名副其实。

original: The Ausar invented the Warp Gates, and therefore firmly placed themselves at the forefront of galactic technology. While they have yet to field an invention to overshadow the gates, the Ausar are still renowned as brilliant scientists, especially in regards to interstellar travel and ships. Ausar shields are second to none, and their ships are exceptionally quick, equipped with advanced LightDrive engines (a refinement on the human invention). However, their technology, being exceptionally complex and prone to gaps in electronic defenses, is well-known to be vulnerable to security breaches. More than once, powerful Ausar fleets or financial institutes have become victims of skilled hackers.
translation: 奥萨尔人发明了折跃门，由此牢牢占据了银河科技的最前沿。尽管他们至今尚未推出足以盖过折跃门的发明，但奥萨尔人仍是公认的杰出科学家，在星际旅行和飞船领域尤其如此。奥萨尔护盾无出其右，他们的飞船也快得惊人，配备了先进的光速推进器引擎（这是对人类发明的改良）。然而，他们的技术极其复杂，电子防御又容易出现漏洞，因此安全性薄弱是出了名的。强大的奥萨尔舰队或金融机构，已不止一次沦为黑客高手刀下的鱼肉。

original: Kaithrit have the normal structure of bipedal humanoids, with two arms and two legs as well as a single head, and fundamentally human-like faces. The hands and feet feature long, sharp-tipped nails that are capable of extending slightly to form dagger-like claws, adept at slashing and piercing, though these are hardly ideal weapons against most modern forms of armor. They have a single pair of large, feline-like triangular ears atop their heads, which are capable of swiveling and moving just like those of a terran cat. Combine this with the fact that they have two tails sprouting from their rear that are also reminiscent of a terran cat, and it’s no wonder that many humans consider them to be “space catgirls”.
translation: 凯斯里特人具有两足类人的正常结构，有两臂、两腿和单头，脸部基本与人类相似。他们的手和脚都长有尖锐的指甲，指甲稍稍伸长就能形成匕首般的利爪，善于劈砍和穿刺，不过这些都不是对付大多数现代盔甲的理想武器。它们头顶上有一对像猫科动物一样的三角形大耳朵，可以像地球上的猫一样旋转和移动。再加上它们后部长出的两条尾巴也很像地球上的猫，难怪许多人类认为它们是“太空猫娘”。

original: The strangest aspect of kaithrit is that they all appear, to a casual glance, female. Even males - or perhaps especially males - have a feminine appearance, being dainty, fine-boned and curvaceous. Females and hermaphrodites are naturally taller than the average male, and more voluptuous - they have larger breasts and buttocks as well as wider hips - but males are easily mistaken for females unless they deliberately flaunt their masculinity. Male genitalia tends to be small, with scrotums that hold themselves snugly against the groin in tight pouches, only furthering the confusion.
translation: 凯斯里特人最奇特的地方在于，它们一眼看上去都是女性。即使是雄性——或者说特别是雄性——也有女性化的外表，娇小玲珑、骨骼细长、曲线优美。雌性和雌雄同体者天生就比一般男性高，而且更加丰满——胸部和臀部更大，臀部更宽——但是雄性很容易被误认为是雌性，除非他们故意炫耀自己的阳刚之气。男性的生殖器往往很小，阴囊紧紧地贴在腹股沟上，只形成一个小包，这只会让人更加混淆。

However, some kaithrit instead have bristly-textured but ultimately canine phalluses, though this is a distinct minority - this is believed to be due to traces of ausar genetics.

original: Although a widely scattered race that can be encountered across much of the known galaxy, with the existence of nomadic space-faring clans and families that happily establish themselves in human or ausar-created colonies alike being reliably documented, kaithrit do in fact have a homeworld. Known as Rosha, it is a lush, verdant orb that sits just slightly closer to its sun than Earth, resulting in an overall tropical and sub-tropical climate. Much of Rosha is grassland or open scrub forests, with dense jungles towards the cooler polar regions, vast mangrove swamps along the coastlines and a dense strip of arid savannas and bushland across the equators. Only at the very poles themselves do tundras and taigas form.
translation: 凯斯里特人虽然散布极广，在已知银河系的大部分区域都能见到他们的身影——有可靠记载表明，一些游牧的星航氏族和家族乐于在人类或奥萨人建立的殖民地安居——但他们确实有自己的母星。这颗星球名为罗莎，是一颗郁郁葱葱的翠绿星球，比地球略靠近其恒星，因此整体上属于热带和亚热带气候。罗莎星的大部分地区是草原或开阔的疏林，较凉爽的极地附近有茂密的丛林，海岸线上遍布广袤的红树林沼泽，赤道沿线则横亘着一条干旱的稀树草原与灌木地带。唯有极地本身，才形成了苔原和针叶林。

However, Kaithrit have been seen all over the galaxy. Some of the more daring have succumbed to their wanderlust and taken to traveling through space, often in clan crews, to colonize and seek their fortune abroad.

original: Kaithrit reproduce in fundamentally normal mammalian style, with males impregnating females who then give birth to live young that are suckled on milk from their mammary glands. Furthering the gender confusion are males who remain in close, constant proximity to an expectant female. Pregnant kaithrit emit a steady wave of hormonal musk which can trigger a lactation response in males, swelling his breasts and allowing mother and father alike to nurse. Kaithrit pregnancy lasts approximately eight months after conception, and results in one to three kittens, though incidents of multiple births are quite low -- most pregnancies result in a single healthy child. Male hormonal balance tends to return to equilibrium faster than females, allowing them to recover from the effects of a female’s pregnancy and return to their normal chest size quickly.
translation: 凯斯里特人的繁殖方式与哺乳动物基本相同，雄性会让雌性受孕，然后雌性会生下活的幼仔，让幼仔吮吸乳腺分泌的乳汁。更让人感到性别混淆的是，雄性会一直与怀孕的雌性保持密切接触。怀孕的凯斯里特人会不断散发出荷尔蒙麝香，这种麝香会引发雄性凯斯里特人的泌乳反应，使其乳房膨胀，让母亲和父亲都能哺乳。凯斯里特人的怀孕期大约在受孕后八个月，会生下一到三只小猫，但多胞胎的情况很少，大多数情况下，怀孕的凯斯里特人只生下一个健康的孩子。雄性的荷尔蒙平衡往往比雌性更快恢复平衡，使它们能够从雌性怀孕的影响中恢复过来，并迅速恢复到正常的胸部大小。

Ausar/kaithrit crossbreeds are most distinctive from purebred kaithrit because males and hermaphrodites typically have ausar-like phalluses, albeit usually with the typical kaithrit texturing.
translation: 凯斯里特人与人类和奥萨尔人杂交的情况已经得到证实。人类与凯斯里特人的杂交种往往具有更像人类的面部特征，通常只有一条尾巴。奥萨尔人与凯斯里特人杂交种与纯种凯斯里特人的最大区别在于，雄性和雌雄同体通常具有类似于奥萨尔人的阴茎，尽管通常具有典型的凯斯里特人纹理。

original: The kaithrit are believed to have a rather human-like evolutionary story, beginning as tree-dwellers who, as the trees gave way to grassland, evolved towards a bipedal frame. As one may expect, the kaithrit’s most distant ancestor was more feline than primate. Perhaps because of this, gender roles also evolved differently to humans; unlike human precursors, these proto-kaithrit were a matriarchal species. The females were, as they are today, bigger and stronger than the males, responsible for hunting and warring with other prides, while the males cared for the offspring. This inversion of human gender roles shows through in many aspects of kaithrit society; it is far more common for a female kaithrit to initiate a relationship than it is for the males, for instance.
translation: 据信，凯斯里特人的进化过程与人类颇为相似，他们最初是树栖动物，随着树木让位于草原，他们进化成了两足动物。正如人们所预料的那样，凯斯里特人最远的祖先是猫科动物，而不是灵长类动物。也许正因为如此，性别角色的演变也与人类不同；与人类的祖先不同，这些原始凯斯里特人是母系物种。和今天一样，雌性比雄性高大强壮，负责狩猎和与其他兽群的战争，而雄性则照顾后代。这种人类性别角色的颠倒体现在凯斯里特人社会的许多方面；例如，雌性凯斯里特人开始一段关系要比雄性凯斯里特人常见得多。

original: Higher intelligence developed in-line with other observed evolution; with bipedal locomotion freeing the hands for other uses, sapience soon followed, the kaithrit becoming masters of tools and molders of their environment. While many aspects of their feral past were discarded on the road to civilization, others remained, and one of these is the social dominance of female over male. Male kaithrit are seen as creators, shapers, builders and caretakers, while females are seen as warriors, pioneers, adventurers and explorers. Men are kept to the background by society, due to the belief in their passivity and frailness; while things are not quite so bad that men are ‘househusbands’ with no greater role in life than to get married, father daughters and look after the house while the woman earns money to support, they are encouraged to take up more intellectual or otherwise passive roles.
translation: 高智商的发展与其他观察到的进化是一致的；两足运动解放了双手的其他用途，智慧也很快随之而来，凯斯里特人成为了工具的主人和环境的塑造者。在通往文明的道路上，凯斯里特人摒弃了过去野性的许多方面，但也保留了其他一些方面，其中之一就是雌性对雄性的社会主导地位。男性凯斯里特人被视为创造者、塑造者、建设者和看护者，而女性则被视为战士、开拓者、冒险家和探险家。由于人们认为男性是被动的、脆弱的，因此男性在社会中处于次要地位；虽然情况还不至于糟糕到男性是“家庭主夫”，在生活中除了结婚、养育女儿和照看家务之外没有更大的作用，而女性则赚钱养家，但人们鼓励他们扮演更多的智力或其他被动角色。
context: <<POS:04781734>> output("\n\nHigher intelligence developed in-line with other observed evolution; with bipedal locomotion freeing the hands for other uses, sapience soon followed, the kaithrit becoming masters of tools and molders of their environment. While many aspects of their feral past were discarded on the roa...

original: Indeed, kaithrit society is in many ways stunningly sexist. Male kaithrit are forbidden to uphold matters of state or assume political roles, because it is believed they are too weak and inept to make hard, necessary decisions - indeed, this same belief holds them away from any position of power or control over others, especially over women. Society coddles them in many ways; males who commit crimes receive weaker punishment than females do, goods crafted by males attract more money, and they receive better service in restaurants and stores. Indeed, it’s surprising just how much they are favored - some xenobiologists and historians point to a significant difference in population ratios between males and females as the reason for these differences, with males being relatively less common than females. In some colony worlds, the lower occurrence of male births can be cause for a great deal of concern, and result in even more stringent constraints on male activity.
translation: 事实上，凯斯里特社会在很多方面都存在着令人震惊的性别歧视。男性凯斯里特人被禁止维护国家大事或担任政治角色，因为人们认为他们太软弱、太无能，无法做出艰难而必要的决定——事实上，同样的信念也让他们远离任何权力或控制他人的职位，尤其是女性。社会在很多方面对他们进行溺爱；男性犯罪受到的惩罚比女性要轻，男性制作的商品能吸引更多的钱，他们在餐馆和商店能得到更好的服务。事实上，他们受宠程度之高令人惊讶——一些异生物学家和历史学家指出，男女人口比例的显著差异是造成这些差异的原因，男性比女性相对较少。在一些殖民地世界，男性出生率较低会引起人们的极大关注，并导致对男性活动的更严格限制。

original: This is not to say that there is not a division between viewpoints on these aspects. While a distinct number of males are accepting of the impositions against their gender due to the privileges they receive, still others resent it and wish to bring their culture more in line with that of many others of the U.G.C., with true equality between the genders. This viewpoint became more popular amongst males, and even began gaining ground amongst the females after contact with other species was established, but it was the Great Exodus that caused the viewpoint to become the simmering underground faction that it is today.
translation: 这并不是说在这些方面没有观点分歧。虽然有相当多的男性因为享有特权而接受了对其性别的强加，但也有一些男性对此深恶痛绝，并希望使他们的文化与 U.G.C. 的许多其他文化更加一致，实现真正的两性平等。这种观点在男性中越来越流行，甚至在与其他物种建立联系后开始在女性中流行起来，但正是大迁徙导致这种观点变成了今天这种沸沸扬扬的地下派别。

original: The Great Exodus was the period immediately following the kaithrit’s contact with the U.G.C. The idea of other planets, people, and other societies fascinated the kaithrit, and as a result the more daring females jumped at the chance to get a license and fly a starship to the great beyond. This was a time of great frustration for males; they were denied the rights to take the test for a license as they were deemed too frail to handle a spaceship. While this didn’t stop some males from stowing aboard visiting ships or even stealing ships for themselves, their restriction from starflight became a matter of great debate, and finally brought to light the fight for equality.
translation: 大迁徙是凯斯里特人与 U.G.C. 接触之后的一段时期。其他星球、人类和其他社会的想法让凯斯里特人着迷，因此，更大胆的女性抓住机会获得执照，驾驶星际飞船飞向远方。这是一个令男性非常沮丧的时代；他们被剥夺了参加执照考试的权利，因为他们被认为太虚弱，无法驾驭飞船。虽然这并没有阻止一些男性登上来访的飞船，甚至为自己偷窃飞船，但他们在星际飞行方面受到的限制成为了人们争论的焦点，最终引发了争取平等的斗争。

original: Hermaphrodites are an uncertainty in the kaithrit viewpoint of the world, and reactions can vary wildly from settlement to settlement. Perhaps as a response, hermaphroditic kaithrit have always been inclined towards nomadic behaviors.
translation: 雌雄同体在凯斯里特人的世界观中是一个不确定因素，不同聚居地的反应也千差万别。或许正因如此，雌雄同体的凯斯里特人历来更倾向于游牧生活。

original: As noted above, kaithrits have feline-like tails, with two to a specimen. These tails are functionally prehensile, if too weak in most cases to use for wielding weapons. An entire social strata exists within kaithrit society involving them; tail body-language is an important part of understanding kaithrits and how they communicate with each other. Motions and positioning, these can all speak volumes to another kaithrit or a trained observer. Contact with a tail is a social language in its own right. Who a kaithrit touches, how, when, and where, are all bound by distinctive aspects of kaithrit propriety. For example, a simple looping of one tail tip around another kaithrit’s tail-tip signifies a friendly acquaintance and is a polite greeting, whilst doing the same with both tails on the same side is a gesture of sibling affection and doing it with one tail on either side, so that both Kaithrits must be facing each other, is a romantic gesture similar to a cuddle. More intimate tail-touches are supposed to be kept private or to the bedroom, but may be seen as an expression of dominance in a social context.
translation: 如上所述，凯斯里特人有两条类似猫科动物的尾巴。这些尾巴具有预伸功能，但在大多数情况下力量太弱，无法用来挥舞武器。在凯斯里特人的社会中，存在着与尾巴有关的整个社会阶层；尾巴的肢体语言是了解凯斯里特人和它们如何相互交流的重要部分。尾巴的动作和摆放位置都能让另一个凯斯里特人或训练有素的观察者一目了然。与尾巴的接触本身就是一种社交语言。凯斯里特人与谁接触、如何接触、何时接触、在哪里接触，都受到凯斯里特礼节的约束。例如，简单地用一条尾巴缠绕另一条凯斯里特人的尾尖表示友好相识，是一种礼貌的问候，而将两条尾巴放在同一侧则是一种兄弟姐妹间的亲昵举动，而将一条尾巴放在两侧，这样两条凯特里特必须面对面，则是一种类似于拥抱的浪漫举动。更亲密的尾巴接触应该是私下或在卧室里进行的，但在社交场合也可能被视为一种支配力的表达。

original: Unlike many advanced species through the galaxy, the Leithans began as prey creatures on their homeworld, and have over the millennia developed several defensive adaptations to ward off the very large, unintelligent predators that attacked them. The first feature most people notice about a Leithan is their natural armor: while the tauric lower body is completely covered with thick, leathery scales (befitting the species’ reptilian origin), the flanks, arms, legs, and tail are protected by a chitinous secondary layer. Leithan armor is thick enough to stop most low-caliber bullets, and even deflect low-grade laser fire at range; more importantly for the species, however, it is capable of withstanding the enormous pressure of most titanic predators’ crushing maws, giving Leithans some defense against their native hunters.
translation: 与银河系中许多先进物种不同，雷坦人最初是母星上的猎物。数千年来，他们演化出了多种防御性适应特征，以抵御那些体型庞大、智力低下的掠食者。雷坦人最引人注目的特征，便是他们的天然甲胄：半人半马的下半身完全被厚实的皮质鳞片覆盖（符合其爬行类起源），而侧腹、手臂、双腿和尾巴则由一层几丁质的第二层护甲保护。雷坦人的甲胄厚到足以抵挡大多数小口径子弹，甚至能在一定距离上偏转低能激光；然而对这个物种来说，更重要的是它能承受大多数泰坦级掠食者那碾碎一切的血盆大口所带来的巨大压力，为雷坦人提供了对抗其本土猎手的防御手段。
context: <<POS:04788621>> output("Unlike many advanced species through the galaxy, the Leithans began as prey creatures on their homeworld, and have over the millennia developed several defensive adaptations to ward off the very large, unintelligent predators that attacked them. The first feature most people notice about a L...

original: Second, the Leithans have developed six powerful legs, allowing them unparalleled running speeds over short bursts. Leithan endurance is not above average, but their speed is usually enough to avoid or outrun danger before exhaustion sets in.
translation: 其次，雷坦人进化出了六条强健的腿，短途冲刺时速度无人能及。他们的耐力虽不出众，但凭这速度，往往能在力竭之前就甩开或躲过危险。

original: Third, Leithans have adapted bright warning signs on their armor plates. These yellow, bioluminescent patterns are unique to each Leithan, and serve to frighten off some larger predators, especially at night. The coloration of their warning lights has become iconic in Leithan culture, and many Leithans choose to dye their hair or decorate themselves with gold stripes and swirls, adding to the effect of their natural defense. The bioluminescent stripes have a variable brightness, controlled subconsciously by their owner: in times of extreme emotion or distress, they flare brighter, while when calm and relaxed, the lights are almost completely dimmed.
translation: 第三，雷坦人的甲片上进化出了醒目的警示标志。这些黄色的生物荧光图案每只雷坦人都不相同，能吓退一些大型掠食者，尤其在夜间效果显著。警示灯的色彩已成为雷坦文化的标志，许多雷坦人选择染发，或用金色条纹和漩涡纹样装饰自己，进一步强化这种天然防御。生物荧光条纹的亮度可变，由主人潜意识控制：情绪极度激动或痛苦时，光芒会骤然增强；平静放松时，灯光几乎完全熄灭。

The atmosphere is naturally very dense and humid, with a water content much higher than that of Terra or Ausaril.

original: The most notable feature of the world are several species of truly titanic, flesh-consuming predators. Ranging from overly large, rudimentarily-intelligent humanoid reptiles standing six stories high to flying creatures vaguely reminiscent of mythological dragons whose wingspan can extend twenty yards in the largest cases, the Leithans arose on a world quite hostile to them, where they were regarded as little more than prey for the titan-class predators. Due to the inherent hostility of their world, many Leithans take the first flight out they can catch, and as such, the Leithan race has become one of the most widespread transplant or immigrant races throughout the galactic core. Relatively few choose to migrate to the fringe, especially during the Planet Rushes, as the Leithans are inherently skittish about danger and violence, and the rough-and-tumble nature of the frontier ill suits them.
translation: 这个世界最骇人的地方，在于几种货真价实的泰坦级食肉巨兽。从六层楼高、智力低下的巨大人形爬虫，到翼展可达二十码、让人想起神话巨龙的飞行生物，雷坦人便是在这样一个对他们充满恶意的世界上演化而来的。在这里，他们不过是泰坦掠食者眼中的饵食罢了。正因故土如此凶险，许多雷坦人但凡能搭上第一班飞船，便会头也不回地逃离。也正因如此，雷坦族成了银河核心星域中分布最广的移居种族之一。选择迁往边缘星域的人相对较少，尤其是在大淘星潮期间——雷坦人天生对危险和暴力心惊胆战，边疆那种粗野动荡的日子，实在不合他们的脾性。

original: The Leithans propagate their race much as many reptilian species do. At certain times of the year (usually twice per year), the female will enter heat, and her body will begin producing a powerful attractive pheromone. This will cause nearby males to seek her out: due to the relative mortality of their race, most Leithan females will accept most if not all suitors to help ensure pregnancy. After a brief gestation period of about one month, she will lay a clutch of eggs, usually in her home or that of a trusted friend and caretaker. An average clutch is between four and six eggs, each of which is nearly two feet long. Eggs hatch after another month-long period, during which the mother will become highly defensive and easily agitated as her maternal instincts insist that she defend her “nest.”
translation: 雷坦人的繁殖方式与许多爬行动物相似。每年特定时节（通常一年两次），雌性会进入发情期，体内开始分泌一种强烈的引诱信息素。这会使附近的雄性前来寻觅：由于雷坦人种族死亡率较高，大多数雌性会接纳大部分甚至所有追求者，以确保受孕。经过约一个月的短暂妊娠期后，她会产下一窝卵，通常是在自己家中或信赖的朋友与看护者家中。一窝卵平均四到六枚，每枚将近两英尺长。再经过一个月，卵便会孵化。在此期间，母性本能驱使雌性守护自己的“巢穴”，她会变得高度戒备，极易焦躁。

original: After the U.G.C. “uplifted” the Leithan race during the early stages of the Planet Rush scheme, the race’s reproductive habits have changed somewhat -- especially among those living away from the homeworld. With a dramatically higher survival rate off-world, Leithan males and females have become more comfortable in being selective with their partners, and recreational sex drive has become much higher. While Leithans still have a difficult time with the concept of monogamy, and most freely move between several partners, the idea of a female allowing any male to approach her in her “heat” period is nearly nonexistent now.
translation: U.G.C.在行星拓荒计划的早期阶段提升了雷坦种族之后，这个种族的生殖习惯发生了一些变化--尤其是那些远离家园的人。由于在地球外的存活率大大提高，雷坦人的男性和女性在选择伴侣时也变得更加挑剔，娱乐性的性欲也变得更强。虽然雷坦人仍然很难接受一夫一妻制的概念，大多数人都会在几个伴侣之间自由转换，但雌性允许任何男性在她的“发情期”接近她的想法现在几乎不存在了。

Because of this, and the higher sex drive among offworld Leithans, many Leithans of both sexes find themselves to be easy “swingers,” and eagerly skip the courting and dating process to open themselves up to several attractive partners of other species, since their couplings are virtually no-risk.

original: Before being uplifted, the Leithans existed as a nomadic species, desperately clinging to their precarious existence in the shadows of titanic predators. Divided into small tribes scattered across the desert, Leithans bands wandered from water source to water source. Over time, their technology advanced in small but important bursts: they discovered methods of water collection from the atmosphere fairly early on, and made great strides to domesticate smaller reptilian creatures which were able to aid them in hunting and alert them against impending attack.
translation: 在被提升之前，雷坦人过着游牧生活，在巨型掠食者的阴影下，于朝不保夕中苦苦求生。他们分成一个个小部落，散落在沙漠各处，逐水而居。随着时间推移，他们的技术虽进展缓慢，却也不乏关键突破：很早就掌握了从大气中汲水的方法，并在驯化小型爬行动物上大有进展——这些生物既能助他们狩猎，也能在危险逼近时发出警讯。
context: <<POS:04793830>> output("Before being uplifted, the Leithans existed as a nomadic species, desperately clinging to their precarious existence in the shadows of titanic predators. Divided into small tribes scattered across the desert, Leithans bands wandered from water source to water source. Over time, their technol...

original: Some Leithans attempted to protect themselves in high-walled cities, and because of this protection and stability, were marginally more successful and advanced than their roaming cousins when First Contact happened. Many of the walled cities had developed primitive flintlock-era firearms and cannons, with which they were able to fend off predator attacks -- one city even created primitive rockets to guard against aerial attacks. Since their uplifting by the U.G.C. in the Third Great Planet Rush, Leithan cities have become veritable fortresses against their one-time predators, and the race has eagerly adapted to the advanced technology the Confederacy brought with it. They have adapted so well, in fact, that in the modern day Leithans are valued as exceptional engineers and technicians, especially in regards to machine maintenance and robotic tech. Many top of the line drones, turrets, and unmanned vehicles are produced in Alpha Centauri or on Leithan colonies.
translation: 一些雷坦人试图在高墙城市中保护自己，由于这种保护和稳定，当第一次接触发生时，他们比游牧的亲戚们稍微成功和先进一些。许多有城墙的城市都发展出了火石时代的原始火器和大炮，他们能够用这些武器抵御掠食者的攻击——有一座城市甚至制造出了原始火箭来抵御空袭。自从在第三次大淘星潮中被银河联合邦联提升之后，雷坦人的城市就成了名副其实的堡垒，可以抵御曾经的掠食者，而这个种族也急切地适应了邦联带来的先进技术。事实上，他们适应得如此之好，以至于在现代，雷坦人被视为杰出的工程师和技术人员，尤其是在机器维护和机器人技术方面。许多顶级的无人机、炮塔和无人驾驶车辆都是在半人马座阿尔法星或雷坦殖民地生产的。

Many of the walled cities had developed primitive flintlock-era firearms...

original: Societally, Leithans are regarded as being very open, friendly, and cooperative. When teamwork and group loyalty are the biggest defense you have against being eaten by a six-story tall monster, it pays to be easy to work with. Most Leithans are highly empathetic, making them keenly aware of others’ emotive states, and are most comfortable in small, close-knit groups of friends. Solitary Leithans are almost unheard of, and most revel in social activity - especially in the core words, where Leithans are constant features of nightclubs, dance halls, and just about any party they can find.
translation: 在社会层面，雷坦人被认为是非常开放、友好和容易合作的。当团队精神和集体忠诚是你防止被六层楼高的怪兽吃掉的最大防御时，容易合作就会得到回报。大多数雷坦人都有很强的同理心，这使他们能敏锐地察觉到他人的情绪状态，并且最喜欢与朋友们组成亲密的小团体。独来独往的雷坦人几乎闻所未闻，他们大多热衷于社交活动——尤其是在核心世界中，雷坦人经常出现在夜总会、舞厅和任何他们能找到的派对中。

Most Leithans are highly empathetic, making them keenly awar...

original: The kui-tan are a humanoid species native to Arcysus’s single orbiting moon, Jitafore, who visually call to mind the mythical ‘tanuki’ of Japanese lore. Their bodies are typical of most intelligent humanoids - two legs, a torso, two arms, and a single head atop the torso. Kui-tan faces are strikingly similar to galactic norms, except that nose and jaws grow together and extend into a short but expressive muzzle, containing prominent canines but altogether omnivorous teeth. A single pair of ears, just pointy enough at the top to be oval-shaped rather than circular, sit atop the head with limited mobility.

original: The most interesting event of note in kui-tan history is some 500 years before the present day, when early experiments in bio-modification went disastrously wrong. The Kintama Plague, as it’s now called, began as an experiment in bio-modding intended to create an easily administered virility booster. Instead, the artificial DNA mutated, got loose and began spreading across the planet like a virus. This mutated bio-mod drastically affected the infected males, causing their semen production to surge into overdrive and leaving them requiring near-constant sexual release to be capable of independent motion.

original: The gryvain are large reptilian humanoids, standing larger and heavier than humans/ausar on average. Gryvain have scale-covered lower bodies, with upper bodies sporting supple, often-colorful skin. In addition to two pairs of large, leathery wings, each gryvain has a pair of curling horns growing from her brow, and slitted reptilian eyes with brilliant yellow irises and ringed by black tendrils at the edge of the sclera. As an all-hermaphrodite race, gryvain are universally feminine in appearance with very large, egg-bearing hips and full breasts. Gryvain have sinuous tails growing from just over their behinds, fully prehensile and tapered to a fine point. Their tails are covered with small, soft scales, and are smooth from tip to base. Gryvain tails help with balance, in flight and on the ground, and can be controlled precisely enough to operate tools and assist in other activities. While the base of the tail is heavily scaled and rather dull, the tapered tip is quite thin and has as much sensitivity as some species’ sex organs.

original: Like many reptilian-origin races, gryvain are infertile except in regular cycles of oestrus lasting about one month out of every year. During this period, the gryvain’s sex drive is markedly increased, and both her sexes are in a state of near-constant arousal, preventing her from easily hiding her state from others, and the sensitivity of her entire body increases dramatically. original: Once impregnated, a gryvain will quickly begin to lactate a thick, sweet pink-colored milk. Their milk production (as with other sexual fluids) is considerably higher than the galactic average, and gryvain breasts tend to swell by several cup sizes once they start. Unlike many other races, once a gryvain begins to lactate, she will not stop for the duration of her life, and the increase in the size and sensitivity of her breasts is permanent. While the average cup size is roughly a C-cup among non-mothers, the average tends toward E to F-cups among those who have borne children. original: After successful conception, a pregnant gryvain will have her belly quickly swell with a growing egg until she’s nearly as gravid as a human female in her third trimester. After six weeks of carrying the egg the expectant mother will lay it, after which it must be kept warm and safe for an additional six weeks whereupon the newborn gryvain will hatch. Gryvains are always born singularly, with no instances of multiple births recorded. Newborns are incredibly small and helpless after birth, and rely on their mother to nurse from. They grow much like human children for the next several years, able to fly, walk, and communicate after two to three years, and reaching sexual maturity at 20 years of age.

Modern gryvain technology is easily the rival of the ausar and other advanced races, and their culture has adapted to highly prize ingenuity and creativity. Manual labor and violence are seen equally as being “barbaric,” fit for younger races and drones; gryvain are much more strongly inclined towards the arts and sciences, as well as flight and interstellar exploration.

Fleet -- for use within their territory, though largely of a mercantile or scientific role. When a Warp Gate first arrived in the gryvain’s system, they were given several decades to study the device and prepare their defenses for alien contact: when the first Confederate scouts poured through the gate during the 10th Great Planet Rush, they were met head-on by a fleet of converted warships, as well as a large and heavily militarized space station that had been hastily constructed at the nearest Lagrange point. Thankfully, both the Confederacy and Republic desired peace, and the tense First Contact was resolved through diplomacy rather than force of arms.

original: After several Planet Rushes, the G.H.R. has made terraforming a veritable art form, and are notable for having created several beautiful resort and luxury planets from otherwise desolate worlds. The Republic frequently contracts with the Confederacy to sculpt or refine worlds to spec, and their diplomatic corp has become quite adept at making contact with and uplifting native populations. While the gryvain enjoy the image of them spreading civilization and beauty across the galaxy, their rapid perfection of planetary renovation and inhabitation has an entirely selfish cause. Unlike most long-lived races, the gryvain have an exceptionally high birthrate and reproductive drive, which means that new worlds are in constant demand to counteract the growing populace. Thanks to the regular Planet Rushes, the gryvain have been able to relax their previously-stringent governmental population control, instead allowing their expanding generations to inhabit distant stars as colonizers, settlers, and immigrants in equal measure.
translation: 历经数次大淘星潮，G.H.R.已将地形改造升华为一门艺术，尤以从荒芜世界中雕琢出数座绝美度假胜地和奢华星球而闻名。共和国常与邦联签约，按规格塑造或精修世界，其外交使团也深谙与土著居民接触并提升其文明之道。格里温人虽乐于展现自身在银河播撒文明与美善的形象，但他们如此迅速完善行星改造与殖民技术，实则全出于私心。与多数长寿种族不同，格里温人拥有极高的生育率和繁殖欲望，这意味着必须不断开拓新世界，才能抵消日益膨胀的人口。正因定期的星球拓荒，格里温人得以放松此前严苛的政府人口管控，转而让不断壮大的世代以殖民者、定居者和移民的身份，同等地栖居于遥远的星辰之间。

original: Despite their rapid expansion, gryvain military technology is notably lacking. They have fairly advanced plasma and laser weapons, but no standing military to speak of, and much of their green-collar work is privatized to Nova Securities or their home-grown robotics companies. Gryvain security, both on and off-world, is largely handled by drones and A.I.-controlled craft, as unlike most human societies, gryvain appear to have no paranoia about a supposed “robot uprising,” and happily let A.I. control any aspect of their security or infrastructure they themselves cannot be bothered with, especially in remote colonies. Gryvain-made A.I. is generally regarded to be among the most convincingly life-like and emotive, and among the most reliable technologically and personally. It’s no surprise that KihaCorp has a strong presence on their homeworld, and employs a large number of gryvain.

original: Suulas are tall, powerfully built predators built for hunting both underwater and in the air. Combining a mix of avian and aquatic traits on a humanoid frame, the suula are considered by many to have both a threatening and alluring physiology. Most members of the species are colorfully-skinned, with broad feathery wings and figures best described as voluptuous. However, they also possess angular faces bearing a double row of rending teeth and a foot long prehensile tongue. Suula digits are clawed, and each has a finned tail capable of delivering hammer-like force. Their ears are tall and finned, and their forelimbs are coated from the wrist to near the shoulders with brilliantly-colored feathers.
translation: 苏拉人体型高大，体格强壮，是天生的猎手，无论水下还是空中都能捕猎。她们将鸟类与水生生物的特征融合在人形躯体上，许多人觉得这种生理结构既令人生畏，又充满诱惑。这个种族大多肤色斑斓，生着宽阔的羽翼，身段只能用丰满来形容。但她们也长着棱角分明的面孔，嘴里排列着两排撕裂猎物的利齿，还有一条一英尺长、能卷握的舌头。苏拉人的指端有利爪，每条带鳍的尾巴都能甩出锤击般的力道。她们的耳朵高耸带鳍，前肢从手腕到接近肩膀处都覆着色彩绚丽的羽毛。

original: After a successful mating, suulas will carry their young for six months before giving birth to live offspring. Birth is comparatively painless for the race thanks to their cilia-lined vaginas, which help to move the offspring out quickly and easily. Most suulas prefer to give birth in shallow water, as this helps to open the newborns’ gills early—as well as easing their own physical burdens due to the pregnancy. Suulas invariably give birth to twinned offspring (so twins, quadruplets and sextuplets are their equivalents of singletons, twins and triplets). Clutches of four are the most common, meaning a mother suula becomes quite gravid during pregnancy.
translation: 成功交配后，苏拉人将怀胎六月，然后产下活体后代。由于阴道内壁布满纤毛，有助于快速轻松地将后代排出体外，分娩对这个种族来说相对轻松。大多数苏拉人喜欢在浅水中分娩，因为这有助于新生儿尽早打开鳃裂，同时也能减轻母体因怀孕而承受的身体负担。苏拉人总是产下双生后代（因此双胞胎、四胞胎和六胞胎就相当于他们的单胎、双胞胎和三胞胎）。四胞胎最为常见，这意味着苏拉母亲在怀孕期间会变得相当大腹便便。

original: Because all suula pregnancies result in multiple births, and the race is quite active in terms of reproduction, so-called “womb siblings” are considered the closest form of relationship (perhaps even stronger a bond than mates or parents), and later in life it is quite common for womb-sisters to share lovers, or even take common mates. Suulas are quite naturally polyamorous, and while most females choose only one “stud” to sire her children, suulas of all sexes commonly enjoy the attentions of several partners. Between womb-siblings’ tendency to share and the race’s naturally high libido, suulas have developed something of a reputation for sexual excess and orgiastic behavior.
translation: 苏拉人每次怀孕都是多胞胎，加上这个种族在繁衍方面相当活跃，所谓的“同胎姐妹”便成了最亲密的关系——或许比伴侣或父母之间的纽带还要牢固。日后，同胎姐妹共享情人，甚至共结连理，都相当常见。苏拉人天生倾向于多角恋，虽然多数女性只会选择一个“种男”来让她受孕，但无论男女，苏拉人都普遍乐于享受多个伴侣的青睐。同胎姐妹间的共享习性，加上这个种族天生旺盛的性欲，让苏拉人落了个纵欲无度、行为放荡的名声。

original: Suulas hail from the oceanic, mountainous world of Valdera, located within the current borders of the Gryvain Heartland Republic. A thick-atmosphere, stormy world, Valdera has little in the way of solid land—and what there is, is extremely rocky and unforgiving, with little vegetation. Because of this, it’s little wonder the suula evolved from predatory fish (believed to be similar to Terran tiger sharks) before acquiring the means to take to the air.
translation: 苏拉人来自海洋与山脉交织的瓦尔德拉星，这颗星球目前位于格里温腹地共和国的疆域之内。瓦尔德拉大气浓密，风暴肆虐，几乎没有像样的陆地——即便有，也是岩石嶙峋、寸草不生的不毛之地。正因如此，苏拉人从掠食性鱼类（据信与泰拉虎鲨相似）进化而来，之后才获得了飞向天空的能力，也就不足为奇了。

original: As they adapted to sapience, and eventually civilization, suulas primarily constructed coastal settlements, combining underwater segments of their cities with vaulting halls dug into the sides of the mountains and cliffs, protected from their homeworld’s violent storms. From these halls, the suula began to mine for crystals and gemstones—to this day, ornamentations of jewelry is culturally significant, both as status symbols and as ornamentation for mating rituals, friendship bonds, and other cultural touchstones.
translation: 随着苏拉人逐渐开化，最终步入文明，他们主要在海滨建立定居点。城市一部分在水下，一部分则是开凿于山崖峭壁间的拱顶殿堂，用以躲避母星肆虐的风暴。从这些殿堂出发，苏拉人开始开采水晶和宝石——时至今日，珠宝饰物在他们的文化中依然举足轻重，既是身份象征，也用于求偶仪式、结交友盟等文化传统。

original: Valdera was discovered in the 10th Great Planet Rush, during which time the suula were in a roughly medieval state of technology and social development. Their upliftment process was difficult, between the species’ surprising shyness in the face of alien contact, compounded by both a spiritual awakening around a latent psionic who claimed the “power of the crystals” to repel the invaders and a rapidly growing war-like sentiment once rushers began strip-mining certain landmasses. It took several decades for Confederate diplomats (and a small force of Terran-Space Coalition marines) to finally bring the various queens and warlords of the planet to the table and begin the uplifting process in earnest.
translation: 瓦尔德拉星发现于第十次大淘星潮期间，彼时苏拉人的科技与社会发展大致处于中世纪水平。他们的提升进程困难重重：这个种族面对外星接触时出奇地羞怯，一位觉醒的灵能者又掀起了一场精神觉醒运动，声称要借“水晶之力”驱逐入侵者，而随着淘金者开始在某些陆块上露天采矿，一股好战情绪也迅速蔓延开来。邦联外交官（以及泰拉空间联盟的一支小型海军陆战队）花了几十年时间，才终于将这颗星球上各据一方的女王和军阀拉到谈判桌前，真正开启了提升进程。

original: Naturally, Valdera’s rich supply of gemstones and precious metals, especially sheradine, has since made the world a fairly profitable destination for trade and mining corporations. Post-First Contact, Steele Tech and Aegis are the primary interests on the planet, with Aegis operating a massive in-atmosphere shipyard on the planet’s watery surface. Hundreds of thousands of suulas are employed by the foundries and yards sprawling across their worlds’ southern ocean.
translation: 自然，瓦尔德拉丰富的宝石和贵金属矿藏，尤其是希拉定，使这颗星球成了贸易和矿业公司相当有利可图的目的地。首次接触之后，斯蒂尔科技和神盾公司成了这颗星球上的主要利益方，神盾公司在星球的水面上运营着一座庞大的大气层内船坞。数十万苏拉人受雇于遍布其星球南部海洋的铸造厂和船坞。

original: As mentioned, Valdera currently resides within the domain of the G.H.R. A very close neighbor of the gryvain homeworld of Vendiko, Valdera’s similar atmosphere and the two races’ similar physiologies suggest a possible shared heritage -- though scientists currently cannot make a certifiable connection that would prove one or both races are descended from a common, terraforming-capable ancestor. Relations between the two species are quite amicable regardless, though each insists that, should there be a shared ancestor, their race was clearly the original. Unsurprisingly, gryvain-suula hybrids are an extremely common occurrence.
translation: 如前所述，瓦尔德拉目前位于银河人类领域境内。这颗行星紧邻格里温人的母星文迪科，两者大气环境相似，两个种族的生理结构也颇为接近，暗示着可能拥有共同的起源——不过科学家目前还无法确证其中一个或两个种族都源自某个具备改造星球能力的共同祖先。尽管如此，两个种族之间的关系相当友好，只是双方都坚称，若真有共同祖先，自己的种族显然才是本源。格里温人与苏拉人的混血儿极为常见，这倒也不足为奇。

original: Suula themselves are best known throughout the galaxy for their singing voices. They were originally called “sirens” by the spacers that first encountered them for good reason: suulas have haunting, song-bird-like voices that carry an enchanting beauty, and among spacers who work and live with them, their voices have taken on an almost mythic quality. Across the rest of the galaxy, suulas count hundreds of best-selling pop icons, opera singers, and even symphonic metal vocalists among their ranks -- any genre where a soulful woman’s voice can make its mark.

Their dedicated military forces are relatively small, operating a few dozen warships to counteract piracy as part of the planet’s Guardian Force, supplemented by G.H.R. and Galactic Guard protection for the species’ handful of newer colonies. Like the gryvain, the suulas heavily supplant their military and worker force with V.I. drones. Most suula-made technology is highly decorative (and expensive) but functional, incorporating gold and gemstones liberally into their designs.

original: The drug commonly known as “Tentatool” has origins in research into restoring limb usage to those that have lost it. Subjects, with a simple pill, could turn all manner of body parts into highly dexterous, prehensile tentacles, and even grow new tentacles. With extra dosages, subjects could go well beyond the original research entirely, discarding their limbs in favor of tentacle bunches.

While fixated on one of the female researchers, he was subdued and restrained. Looking into what had gone wrong, the researchers came to discover exactly what their drug did. While use of the drug was safe up to a point, the ultimate result of continued use was a complete decentralization of the nervous system. A subject’s nervous system would eventually be distributed among their many tentacles, leading to a complete loss of their sense of self and leaving them a mindless, instinct-driven monster.

original: Before gate technology was discovered, numerous attempts at colonization were made using a combination of cryogenic technologies and long, automated spaceflights. New Texas was founded by one such mission, launched by colonists out of Houston. As part of an early population-building initiative, the Treatment was designed by top earth scientists as a means of ensuring high fertility and virility rates among the future colonists. This early form of the iconic mutagen was far less dramatic than the one that’s become famous today.
translation: 在折跃门技术被发现之前，人们曾多次尝试利用低温技术和漫长的自动太空飞行进行殖民。新德克萨斯就是由这样一次任务建立的，由休斯顿的殖民者发起。作为早期人口增长计划的一部分，顶尖的地球科学家设计了调育疗程，以确保未来殖民者拥有高生育率和生殖力。这种标志性诱变剂的早期形式，远没有今天闻名遐迩的版本那么剧烈。

original: However, the agrarian society that sprung up on the recently christened “New Texas” quickly became something of a patriarchy. With most women pregnant and indoors, the men were free to run the planet as they saw fit, and as a consequence, gender roles regressed to terran pre-industrial levels. The few scientists on planet found this arrangement enjoyable and began modifying the Treatment in an effort to make their planet even more of a paradise, adding bull-like strength to males and enhancing the feminine libido and endorphin production.
translation: 然而，在这个新近被命名为“新德克萨斯”的星球上，兴起的农耕社会很快就演变成了某种父权制。大多数女性怀孕后足不出户，男性便得以随心所欲地治理这个星球，结果性别角色倒退回了泰拉前工业时代的水平。星球上为数不多的科学家觉得这种安排很惬意，于是开始改良调育疗程，试图将他们的星球打造成更完美的乐园——他们赋予男性公牛般的力量，并增强了女性的淫性与内啡肽分泌。
